title: sebastiania glandulosa var. campestris
intro: Sebastiania glandulosa var. campestris, also known as the 'Brazilian aloe', is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sebastiania glandulosa var. campestris include the treatment of wounds, burns, and skin conditions due to its ability to accelerate wound healing and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations such as infusions, ointments, and salves, which can be applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
